title: dendranthema variifolium
intro: Dendranthema variifolium, also known as Korean chrysanthemum or Dendranthema, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Dendranthema variifolium include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting a good night's sleep. In herbal preparations, the flowers are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal and health benefits.
